title: eval-case-v1
description: Versioned schema for a single eval case across all autonomous-dev-assist eval suites. v1 is closed (no additional properties).

id.description: Format: <suite>-<category>-<NNN>. Lowercase, hyphen-separated, ending with a 3-digit ordinal. Example: chains-list-001.

category.description: Case category. One of the 10 enum values.

question.description: The operator's question, verbatim. Length bounded to keep cases readable.

expected_topics.description: Topics the correct response should cover. At least one required.

must_mention.description: Substrings/regex the correct response MUST include. May be empty for negative cases.

must_not_mention.description: Substrings/regex the response MUST NOT include. Hard-fail on match.
